description: India Book III, 40a. List of customs paid in Aydhab by Avraham Ibn Yiju, around 1152. IB III, 40a is the top of the page. IB III, 40b is the bottom of the page. III, 40c is the verso, a draft of a letter written by Avraham b. Yiju for another man and having nothing to do with the India trade, and therefore not edited in Goitein-Friedman. It is, however, edited in Assaf, Texts, 149-51.
tags: Ibn Yiju, customs, India, State, IB3, account
description_he: ספר הודו III,40א: רשימת מכסים ששולמו באיידהאב על ידי אברהם אבן יג'ו, כ-1152
